UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Louisa Cabrera.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ronald Ortega is present.
Attorney Amber Lu representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of June-18-2012 is vacated. Case settled. (501/JPT)
